name: ENDOMETRIOID CARCINOMA OF OVARY

demographics.Frequency: 8-15% of all ovarian cancers; 2nd most common malignant ovarian neoplasm (after
demographics.Associated with: hyperplasia / carcinoma of the uterine endometrium in 20-33%
demographics.Path: malignant mixed mesodermal tumor = carcinoma-sarcoma is grouped with endometrioid
demographics.Histo: tubular glandular pattern with a pseudostratified epithelium resembling endometrial

dominant_finding: bilateral in 15% of stage I cases
distribution: bilateral in 15% of stage I cases
discriminating_features: bilateral in 15% of stage I cases

general: bilateral in 15% of stage I cases
